# AddedEducation

AddedEducation is a premium university admissions consultancy helping high-achieving students gain admission to top universities worldwide across 12+ countries.

## Services

- [Full Service Admissions](https://zmiftah.tech/programs/admissions) - End-to-end university guidance from first draft to acceptance letter
- [Athletic Counseling](https://zmiftah.tech/programs/athletic) - University admissions counseling for student-athletes
- [AddedArt](https://zmiftah.tech/programs/arts) - Creative arts division for portfolio and arts school applications
- [AddedTutoring](https://zmiftah.tech/programs/tutoring) - Curriculum tutoring for MYP, IB, IGCSE, AS, A-Level, AP
- [AddedNova Research](https://zmiftah.tech/programs/research) - University-level research mentorship program

## About

- [About Us](https://zmiftah.tech/about) - Our story, mission, and team
- [Events](https://zmiftah.tech/events) - Upcoming webinars and events
- [Resources](https://zmiftah.tech/resources) - Articles and insights on university admissions

## Contact

- [Get In Touch](https://zmiftah.tech/get-in-touch) - Book a free 30-minute consultation
